scenarios.description: children() rebuilds childElementsList when shadowChildrenRef exists but referent has been cleared (weakRef.get()==null)
scenarios.precondition: Element el with one Element child and a non-null shadowChildrenRef whose referent is null
scenarios.expectedResult: children() returns new Elements wrapping a freshly built list containing the single child
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children rebuild on cleared weak reference
// use reflection to set private shadowChildrenRef to a WeakReference with null referent
